decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'corridor_utica-ave-carroll-to-church' already exists in the registry as an exact match — same source (2012_01_24_sbs_utica_merchants), same corridor (Utica Avenue), same limits (Carroll St. to Church Ave.), same borough (Brooklyn). The observation already resolves to its own canonical record, so no link to a different record is needed. A same_as relation is proposed to the broader corridor_utica-av record which represents the identical real-world corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the Utica Ave. Corridor Study Area in New York City. The map shows a grid of streets with a red double-headed arrow indicating the corridor from Carroll St. to Church Ave. along Utica Ave. The study area is labeled "Study Area: Carroll St. to Church Ave." in a box at the top left.

proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the identical Utica Avenue corridor from Carroll St. to Church Ave. in Brooklyn. corridor_utica-ave-carroll-to-church is the study-area-specific record sourced from the 2012-01-24 merchants presentation; corridor_utica-av is the broader aggregated record that already carries aliases corridor_utica-ave-carroll-st-to-church-ave and corridor_utica-ave-carroll-church-2012. Same street, same limits, same borough.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the Utica Ave. Corridor Study Area in New York City. The map shows a grid of streets with a red double-headed arrow indicating the corridor from Carroll St. to Church Ave. along Utica Ave. The study area is labeled "Study Area: Carroll St. to Church Ave." in a box at the top left.
